'''A-77''' was a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] under the command of [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]], while trying to hunt down [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]].

==Biography==
Yoda had a rendezvous with [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] on [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]], but he preferred traveling incognito. When [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] [[Jai Maruk]] and [[Maks Leem]], along with their [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]], [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]] and [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]], and the unrecognizable Master Yoda arrived at [[Phindar/Legends|Phindar]], [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] and her droid battalion were waiting for them.

She had discovered that Yoda used a lure, the actor [[Palleus Chuff]], and Ventress threatened to kill him. While Yoda was trying to save him, A-77 followed the Master to shoot him, but Yoda [[Sai cha/Legends|beheaded]] the droid.

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book and [[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}}
